pinyin: dà jiā hǎo, wǒ jiào Lǐ Míng.
translation: Hello everyone, my name is Li Ming.

pinyin: wǒ shì Zhōng guó rén, lái zì Běi jīng.

text: 今年二十五岁，是一名老师。
pinyin: jīn nián èr shí wǔ suì, shì yì míng lǎo shī.
translation: I am 25 years old this year, and I am a teacher.

text: 我在大学教中文，已经教了三年了。
pinyin: wǒ zài dà xué jiāo Zhōng wén, yǐ jing jiāo le sān nián le.
translation: I teach Chinese at a university. I have been teaching for three years.

text: 我的爱好是看书和旅行。
pinyin: wǒ de ài hào shì kàn shū hé lǚ xíng.
translation: My hobbies are reading and traveling.

text: 我去过很多国家，最喜欢日本。
pinyin: wǒ qù guo hěn duō guó jiā, zuì xǐ huān Rì běn.
translation: I have been to many countries. I like Japan the most.

text: 我会说中文和英文，正在学西班牙语。
pinyin: wǒ huì shuō Zhōng wén hé Yīng wén, zhèng zài xué Xī bān yá yǔ.
translation: I can speak Chinese and English, and I am learning Spanish.

text: 我的性格比较外向，喜欢交朋友。
pinyin: wǒ de xìng gé bǐ jiào wài xiàng, xǐ huān jiāo péng you.
translation: I am quite outgoing and like to make friends.

text: 很高兴认识你们，希望我们可以成为好朋友。
pinyin: hěn gāo xìng rèn shi nǐ men, xī wàng wǒ men kě yǐ chéng wéi hǎo péng you.
translation: Nice to meet you all. I hope we can become good friends.

pinyin: xiè xiè dà jiā de líng tīng!
